summary: Comprehensive testing of StudyMax MVP completed successfully. All core features working properly including authentication, MAX MODE timer, dashboard analytics, AI coach, and profile management.
passed_tests: Backend API health check - all 13 endpoints working (100% success rate)
User authentication (signup/login) with JWT tokens
Session management - start, phase completion, active session tracking
Dashboard data retrieval with stats and weekly charts
Profile data with badges and level progression
AI Coach feedback generation using OpenAI GPT-4o
Landing page loads with proper hero section and features
Auth flow - login/signup toggle working correctly
Home page displays user stats and START MAX MODE button
MAX MODE timer - 4-phase system (Preview, Learn, Recall, Test)
Phase progression and completion tracking
Timer pause/resume functionality
Exit confirmation modal with proper flow
Dashboard with discipline score, streaks, and weekly consistency chart
Profile page with user info, level, and earned badges
AI Coach page with feedback generation
Navigation between all pages working smoothly
Logout functionality with proper redirect to landing page
Protected routes - all routes properly redirect unauthenticated users
Re-login capability after logout
Professional dark theme (Obsidian Stealth) implemented correctly
Electric blue accents (#2563eb) and proper typography
Discipline score calculation and level progression
Streak tracking logic working correctly
Badge system - 'First Session' badge awarded properly
